setting: Late-night phone call between a couple. One person (Maya) is feeling anxious and calls the other (Ken) for comfort.
lyrics:
Ooh
Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah
Ooh

Hello
Are you awake right now?
God, I just need to hear the sound of you
Please calm me down
And I know that it's selfish, but
You are the only thing that's
Ever made sense to me, I
I don't wanna do this
I don't know how to do this without you

Cling to your side, voices at night
Cover my eyes, I'm terrified

No in between, a face on a screen
Ain't an adequate replacement for your being with me (Yeah-yeah)

Too much time in the limelight
Gimme your all on the landline
Want it so bad but I won't lie
And it just gets worse in the nighttime
Never stays for long (Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah)
And she's gone in the morning (Ooh)

When you come home
I just got over bein' less of you
When you leave me, I'm in pieces
Maybe it's better if we cut it loose

Tell me how your day was
No, I'm not okay

I don't know, I don't know, I don't know
I don't know, I don't know, I don't know
Time never moved so slow
Bed time, hit your phone up
Tell me where to go, where to go
Tell me where to go, where to go-oh-oh

Too much time in the limelight
Gimme your all on the landline
Want it so bad but I won't lie
And it just gets worse in the nighttime
Never stays for long (Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah)
And she's gone in the morning (Ooh)

When you come home
I just got over bein' less of you
When you leave me, I'm in pieces
Maybe it's better if we cut it loose

I don't know how to do this without you
I don't know, I don't know, don't know
I don't know how to do this without you
I don't know, I don't know, don't know
I don't know how to do this without you

Ooh
Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah
Ooh

lyricsJa.en: Ooh
lyricsJa.ja: Ooh

lyricsJa.en: Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah
lyricsJa.ja: Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah

lyricsJa.en: Ooh
lyricsJa.ja: Ooh

lyricsJa.en: Hello
lyricsJa.ja: もしもし

lyricsJa.en: Are you awake right now?
lyricsJa.ja: 今、起きてる？

lyricsJa.en: God, I just need to hear the sound of you
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、ただ君の声が聴きたいんだ

lyricsJa.en: Please calm me down
lyricsJa.ja: 僕を落ち着かせて

lyricsJa.en: And I know that it's selfish, but
lyricsJa.ja: わがままだって分かってる、けど

lyricsJa.en: You are the only thing that's
lyricsJa.ja: 僕にとって唯一意味があるのは

lyricsJa.en: Ever made sense to me, I
lyricsJa.ja: 君だけなんだ

lyricsJa.en: I don't wanna do this
lyricsJa.ja: こんなの嫌だよ

lyricsJa.en: I don't know how to do this without you
lyricsJa.ja: 君なしでどうすればいいか分からないんだ

lyricsJa.en: Cling to your side, voices at night
lyricsJa.ja: 君の側にしがみつく、夜に響く声

lyricsJa.en: Cover my eyes, I'm terrified
lyricsJa.ja: 目を覆う、怖くてたまらないんだ

lyricsJa.en: No in between, a face on a screen
lyricsJa.ja: 中途半端はなし、画面の中の顔

lyricsJa.en: Ain't an adequate replacement for your being with me (Yeah-yeah)
lyricsJa.ja: 君が隣にいてくれる代わりにはならないよ

lyricsJa.en: Too much time in the limelight
lyricsJa.ja: 脚光を浴びる時間が長すぎた

lyricsJa.en: Gimme your all on the landline
lyricsJa.ja: 電話越しに君のすべてを聴かせて

lyricsJa.en: Want it so bad but I won't lie
lyricsJa.ja: たまらなく欲しい、嘘じゃない

lyricsJa.en: And it just gets worse in the nighttime
lyricsJa.ja: 夜になるともっとひどくなるんだ

lyricsJa.en: Never stays for long (Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah)
lyricsJa.ja: 長くは続かない（Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah）

lyricsJa.en: And she's gone in the morning (Ooh)
lyricsJa.ja: 朝には彼女はいなくなってしまう

lyricsJa.en: When you come home
lyricsJa.ja: 君が帰ってくる頃には

lyricsJa.en: I just got over bein' less of you
lyricsJa.ja: 君がいない寂しさをやっと乗り越えたところなんだ

lyricsJa.en: When you leave me, I'm in pieces
lyricsJa.ja: 君が行ってしまうと、僕はバラバラになる

lyricsJa.en: Maybe it's better if we cut it loose
lyricsJa.ja: いっそ終わりにしちゃった方がいいのかな

lyricsJa.en: Tell me how your day was
lyricsJa.ja: 今日がどんな日だったか教えて

lyricsJa.en: No, I'm not okay
lyricsJa.ja: いや、僕は全然大丈夫じゃない

lyricsJa.en: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know
lyricsJa.ja: 分からない、分からない、分からないんだ

lyricsJa.en: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know
lyricsJa.ja: 分からない、分からない、分からないんだ

lyricsJa.en: Time never moved so slow
lyricsJa.ja: 時間が経つのがこんなに遅いなんて

lyricsJa.en: Bed time, hit your phone up
lyricsJa.ja: 寝る時間、君に電話をかける

lyricsJa.en: Tell me where to go, where to go
lyricsJa.ja: どこへ行けばいいか、どこへ行けばいいか教えて

lyricsJa.en: Tell me where to go, where to go-oh-oh
lyricsJa.ja: どこへ行けばいいか教えて

lyricsJa.ja: 長くは続かない（Ooh, dah-dah-dah-dah-dah）

lyricsJa.en: And she's gone in the morning (Ooh)

lyricsJa.ja: 君が行ってしまうと、僕はバラバラになる

lyricsJa.ja: いっそ終わりにしちゃった方がいいのかな

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.japanese: ああ、うん、かろうじてね。どうかした？もうずいぶん遅いよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I needed to hear your voice.
sentences.displayHtml: I needed to hear your voice.

conversation.japanese: ううん、大丈夫じゃないの。ただ… あなたの声が聞きたかっただけ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Are you having trouble sleeping again?
sentences.displayHtml: Are you having trouble sleeping again?

conversation.japanese: どうしたの、ハニー。何かあった？また眠れないのかい？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It just gets worse at night.
sentences.displayHtml: It just gets worse at night.

sentences.text: I feel so lost without you.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel so lost without you.

conversation.japanese: うん。頭の中がぐるぐるしてるの。夜になると余計にね。あなたがいないと、とても心細くなるの。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: A face on a screen isn't the same, but I wish I could be there with you right now.
sentences.displayHtml: A face on a screen isn't the same, but I wish I could be there with you right now.

conversation.japanese: わかるよ。僕がいるから。画面越しの顔じゃ同じじゃないけど、今すぐ君のそばにいてあげられればいいのに。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It makes me feel terrified sometimes when you're not around.
sentences.displayHtml: It makes me feel terrified sometimes when you're not around.

sentences.text: Could you just calm me down?
sentences.displayHtml: Could you just calm me down?

conversation.japanese: 本当に違うの。あなたがそばにいないと、時々すごく不安になるの。私を落ち着かせてくれない？

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.japanese: もちろん、できるよ。僕と一緒に息をして。きっと乗り越えられるから。君は一人じゃないよ。
